findings: Monitor has no signal traps; Ctrl-C/TERM exits without structured cleanup/teardown event.
Partial and full completion both exit 0, so wrappers cannot distinguish degraded stop outcomes.
Orphan recovery only runs when live_agents==0; one stale live pane can block recovery indefinitely.
read -t timeout defaults to yes for merge prompt; potentially destructive default behavior.
Multiple silent-failure paths (tmux stderr suppression, stats write except:pass) reduce teardown observability.
